content.text: The system shall provide an Action menu (⋮) for each row in the Rules and Action table.
an Action menu (⋮) for each row in the Rules and Action table,
I can access edit or other element-level actions easily.
the Rules and Action table is displayed,
the user hovers over or clicks the Action icon (⋮) beside a row,
the system shall display an Action menu specific to that element.
The system shall display an Edit Element option in the Action menu for that row.
an Edit Element option inside the Action menu,
I can modify the name of an existing rack element.
the user views the menu options,
Edit Element shall be listed along with other possible actions (e.g., Delete, View).
When the user selects Edit Element, the system shall open an Edit Element modal centered on the screen.
the Edit Element option to open a modal popup,
I can view and edit element details without leaving the page.
an Edit Element modal shall appear centered on the screen.

4.title: Display Current Element Name and Reference Element dropdown

content.text: The Edit Element modal shall display the current value of the Element’s name and Reference Element in an editable text input field.
the modal to pre-fill the existing Element Name and Reference Element in an editable field,
I can see and update the current value.
the current Element Name shall appear in an editable text input labeled Element Name, and current Reference Element shall appear in Reference Element dropdown.
The Edit Element modal shall include two buttons: Cancel and Save Changes.
the modal to include Cancel and Save Changes buttons,
I can choose to either discard or confirm my edits.
the Edit Element modal is open,
the user views the bottom section,
two buttons shall be visible: Cancel and Save Changes.
Clicking Cancel shall clear any unsaved changes in the input field and restore the original Element Name value from before opening the modal.
the Cancel button to clear unsaved changes and restore the original name,
the user edits the Element Name,
the modal shall reset the field to its original value and close the modal without saving.

7.title: Show Confirmation Popup When Saving Edited Element

content.text: When the user clicks Save Changes in the Edit Element form, the system shall display a confirmation pop-up titled “Confirm Update Element”
a confirmation popup to appear when I click Save Changes in the Edit Element form
I can confirm the update before the system applies configuration changes.
the user is on the Edit Element form
the system shall display a confirmation pop-up titled “Confirm Update Element”.
The confirmation pop-up shall include a description “You’re about to update this element’s configuration. Please confirm that all linked activity phases and observations should be updated as well.
the confirmation popup to show a clear description of the impact
I understand that linked activity phases and observations may also be updated.
“You’re about to update this element’s configuration. Please confirm that all linked activity phases and observations should be updated as well.”

9.title: Display Cancel and Confirm & Update Buttons

content.text: The pop-up shall contain two buttons: Cancel and Confirm & Update.
the popup to display Cancel and Confirm & Update buttons
I can choose whether to proceed with the update or cancel it.

10.title: Cancel Closes Popup Without Saving Changes

content.text: Clicking Cancel shall close the confirmation pop-up and return the user to the Edit Element form without applying changes.
clicking Cancel to close the popup and return me to the form
I can continue editing without saving changes.
the system shall return to the Edit Element form
Clicking Confirm & Update shall save all changes made to the element and update any linked activity phases and observations as required.
clicking Confirm & Update to save my edits
the element and all linked configurations are updated correctly.
Save all changes made to the element
Update all linked observations as required

12.title: Close Modals and Refresh Element List After Update

content.text: After successful update, the system shall close all models and refresh the element list to reflect updated details.
the system to close all popups and refresh the list after a successful update
I can immediately see the updated element details.
the element list shall refresh to reflect the updated details.

13.title: Refresh Table Row After Successful Update

content.text: After a successful update, the system shall immediately refresh the table row with the new Element Name without requiring a full page reload.
the updated element’s row in the table to refresh immediately after saving changes
I can see the new Element Name without needing a full page reload.
the user successfully updates an element
the specific table row for that element shall refresh automatically
it shall display the updated Element Name
the page shall not reload fully.
After a successful update, the system shall display a success toast/notification in the top right corner of the screen with the message: “Element updated successfully.”
a success toast notification after the update
I receive confirmation that the element was updated.
a success toast shall appear in the top-right corner with the message:
The system shall provide a close (“X”) icon in the top right of the Edit Element modal to allow the user to dismiss the modal without saving.
a close (“X”) icon at the top-right of the modal,
I can dismiss the popup without saving.
the Edit Element modal is open,
the modal shall close immediately without saving any changes.

16.title: Validate Empty or Invalid Element Name

content.text: If the Element Name field is empty or invalid when the user clicks Save Changes, the system shall prevent saving and display an inline error message below the field (e.g. “Element name is required”).
the system to prevent saving if the Element Name field is empty or invalid,
no incomplete or incorrect data is saved.
the Element Name field is empty or invalid,
Display an inline error message below the field (e.g., “Element name is required”),
Keep the modal open for correction.
